name: Yao (In Development)
description: Yao is an open-source engine for autonomous agents - event-driven, proactive, and self-scheduling. Build agents that work like real team members with three trigger modes: Clock (scheduled), Human (email/message), and Event (webhook/database).

notes.text: A minimal app.yao configuration is created automatically at /opt/yao/app.yao
Access the web interface at http://IP:5099
Application data is stored in /opt/yao/data/ including the SQLite database
Yao includes built-in SQLite database, V8 JavaScript engine, and TypeScript runtime - no additional dependencies required.
